titleStmt.title: SII 27.294: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 294. (A.R. No. 324 of 1937-38.) PRĀTAKŌṬA, NANDIKOTAKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the compound of the Nāgēśvarasvāmin temple.
This record states that Mādhayya had a temple with a gōpura and tōraṇa constructed for god Mādhavēśvara-bhaṭāra.

It is dated the cyclic year Prajōtpatti, śu. 10, Monday, Chittānakshatra. On palaeographical grounds the record may be assigned to the 10th century in which case these details regularly correspond to 971 A.D., June 29, Monday, f.d.t. ·47 and f.d.n. ·04. The month would be Āshāḍha. It gives further details of date, viz., Śiva-yōga, Kauḷa-karaṇa and Siṁga-lagna, Bṛihaspati in Udaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
prajōtpatti saṁvatsara
śuklapakṣada sōmavāra daśamiyu
cittanakṣatramuṁ śivamemba yōgamuṁ
kāḷameṁmma karaṇamu siṁgalagnamu bṛ
haspati Udayadoḷu mādhavayya
mādhavēśvarabhaṭaraṅge gōpura sahi
tamāgire dēgulamu tōraṇamuṁ
niṟisida dharmmadamēru Īśvaradāsu
yāvattiṣṭhanti candrārkka yāvattiṣṭhanti mēdini
yāvaddharma kathālōke tāvattiṣṭhanti tōraṇaṁ
yāvattiṣṭhanti samudrāṇi yāvattiṣṭhanti mandire
yāvatparvvatā tiṣṭhanti tāvattiṣṭhanti tōraṇaṁ
rantu mahāpuṇyaṁ darśanaṁ pāpanāśanaṁ
naṁ sarvantiṣṭhanti Ama ha tōraṇaṁ
tōraṇaṁ baddhaślōkasya mādhavāryyēna ni
rmitaḥ yaḥ pa nitya
Digital edition of SII 27.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
